item.title: 13.4K BCE
item.description: Events Comet dust Enhancements in Camp Century Ice Core at 17.7K, 14.4K, 13.4K, 12K BCE period (Clube & Napier). Session Quotes Session Date: Dec 10, 2010 Q: (L) Well, I wanted to ask some questions about Earth Changes.

item.title: 890 Million YA
item.description: Events Formation of Oort Cloud comet cluster (Current Periodicity: 3600 years). Session Quotes Oort Cloud Comet Cluster First Entry (Current Periodicity: 3600 years): Pictograph , spirograph biggest one being 900 miles Session Date: Oct 07, 1994 Q: (L) How long has this comet cluster been with us in our solar system? A: 890 million years.

item.title: 5.3 Million YA
item.description: Events Earth’s Oldest Man-Neanderthal. Session Quotes Session Date: Apr 15, 2000 Q: (L) What is the oldest Neanderthal that’s been found? Anybody know? No, well then when did Neanderthal appear on the planet? A: 5.3 million years ago.

item.title: 309K YA
item.description: Events Lizards take over of 3D Earth. Start of 309K years Wave Cycle. Fall of Man - Adam & Eve. Lemuria submerged (Pacific Ocean). Easter Island is remnant of Lumeria.

item.title: 350K YA
item.description: Events Landing Strip on Moon. Session Quotes Session Date: Jan 22, 2000 Q: Now, we have this picture of this sort of “track” on the Moon here. It is 29 KM long and about 1 KM wide, and they are calling it a “landing strip.” Well, it’s pretty big to be a landing strip, in my opinion.

item.title: 3 Billion YA
item.description: Events Birth of Moon from Earth (Cometary interaction). Session Quotes Session Date: October 22, 1994 Q: (L) When and how did planet earth acquire its moon? A: Was caused by the regular passage of a large comet cluster which caused a gravitational disruption allowing a large chunk of the original earth’s surface, which was somewhat less solid at that point in space/time, to break away from the main body and assume a locked in orbit around the main body.

item.title: 27 Million YA
item.description: Events Sun’s twin (nemesis) Interaction - 27 Mill. year ago & cyclical Phenomenon. Dinosaurs Extinct (18 miles Comet bombarded). Session Quotes Session Date: Aug 15, 1998 Q: (L) We have been discussing this period of the Brown Star.

item.title: 28.2 Million YA
item.description: Events Sun and its nemesis closest interaction period. Session Quotes Session Date: Jan 30, 2010 (Ark) 1998 [session about] sun’s companion. So, I asked the question: how close would it come, and the answer was, “Distance depends upon other factors, such as intersecting orbit of locator of witness”.

item.title: 130K YA
item.description: Events Planting of Jews (genetically engineered just like every body else). Session Quotes Session Date: May 31, 1997 Q: Were the Jews that were genetically engineered and then planted in the Middle East… what year was this? A: 130,000 years ago.

item.title: 100K YA
item.description: Events Magnetic pole shift period. Session Quotes Session Date: Jul 11, 1998 Q: (A) What is the period of pole shift? A: 100,000 years, roughly. Session Date: Jul 11, 1998 Q: (A) We have been told that there is going to be a change of the magnetic field of the earth.
